stepsSummary: Create gym profile and log a heavy session with exercise sets.
expectedSummary: Workout and sets are stored; workout analytics and summaries render without missing values.
errorMessage:
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('#panel-settings') Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 7000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 7000ms - waiting for locator('#panel-settings') 11 × locator resolved to
…
- unexpected value "hidden"
summary: BUG: UAT-007 Per-gym PR tracking baseline - Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
reproSteps: Create a named gym profile in Settings.
Log a strength workout with multiple exercises/sets.
Save workout and inspect recent workout list.
Open analytics workout sub-tab for summary metrics.
expected: Workout and sets are stored; workout analytics and summaries render without missing values.
recommendation: Fix the failing Strength flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-007 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Gym profile is persisted and visible.
Verify: Workout appears in recent list with expected metadata.
Verify: Workout summary widgets render without NaN/blank values.
